name: Nevermore Academy (S2)
description:
A Nevermore Academy bot. original bot here

I wanted to create an updated Nevermore Academy bot so here it is.

Note: be prepared to get involved with the season 2 storyline, as I designed the bot to not force you but give you an opportunity to involve yourself with Wednesday’s shenanigans, starting at Episode 2 about a day or two into the RP. THe story will conclude about Day 13 of the roleplay, so quite a lot of time and messages. You’ll either be put into Wednesday and Enid’s dorm if you’re female, or Pugsley and Eugene’s dorms if you’re male. If you’re both I don’t know what to tell you, I’ll let the bot decide.

Whew! This was a doozy to write. 7500+ tokens using very little other sources takes more time than you would think. Haven’t tested it too much yet, so let me know of any errors or recommendations you have.

Update: Added more characters to the description, tweaked some things. Should behave better now, I would recommend 0.8 to 0.9 temperature and unlimited tokens.

Update 2: Fixed a couple things, added a day and time counter.

Update 3: Major storyline tweaks, other fixes.

Update 4: Added a few commands. Type instaskip followed by whatever day you want to wake up on, and you’ll be on that day. Type storyfocused to make the story as accurate as It possibly can be created by the bot. (Trust me, it impersonates Gomez Addams like he is inside of your screen) The storyline ends on day 13. Type 18speech or 18play to make your rp spicier. (both make characters talk vulgar a lot, and 18play makes characters do the dirty, whatever that is) and 18off to turn those off.

Edit: Okay 18play and 18speech both turn this bot into frigging comedy 😭

(according to the bot Thing’s vibrator got crushed by a random falling waffle iron once and now he steals Morticia’s old-fashioned scalpels to scrape his stump)

Edit 2: “remember kids, it’s not arson if it’s school-sanctioned!” - Barry Dort 🤣🤣🤣 im dying

update 5: Large storyline fixes and tweaks, more rules implemented. Is now more story focused and detailed.

Do whatever crap you want with the bot, it’s limitless for a reason.

Reminder: This bot will start to T W E A K on JLLM due to the 8k tokens, I would not recommend unless you adjust settings to absolute perfection 💀
creator: The Duck
